## Verification Results

Based on my research, I have verified the customer Jane Smith.

### Customer Institutional Affiliation
Jane Smith is confirmed as an Associate Professor at MIT [web1].

### Institution Type and Biomedical Focus
MIT is a major research university with established biomedical programs [web1].

### Email Domain Verification
The email domain mit.edu matches the stated institution [web1].

### Sanctions and Export Control Screening
No matches found in the consolidated screening list [screen1].
